name: Italian Meatball Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, then stir in the milk and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, cinnamon, ground cloves, nutmeg, cocoa powder) to the wet mixture alternately with each addition being thoroughly incorporated before the next.
4. Stir in the chopped nuts, chocolate bits or chips, and raisins until evenly distributed.
5. Form small balls of dough, about 1-2 inches in diameter.
6. Place the cookies on a greased cookie sheet, spacing them a few inches apart.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Remove from the oven and allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
This recipe makes about 10 dozen cookies, depending on their size.
